chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6056 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 24.03.2025 Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fawad Chand, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the respondent No.2. Per learned counsel, notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel for the petitioner further states that notice be adjudicated by respondent vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
